RichText.Text: 1. the rise in car numbers 2. be supposed to do sth. 3. Support, trust and honesty are givens. 4. Be all ears to your friends. 5. have a hard time making space for... 6. approve of their choices 7. forgive the weakness of others seek forgiveness (forgave-forgiven) 8. bring perfection to a relationship Practice makes perfect. perfect your skills （v.） 9. set up personal boundaries 10. for fear of being hurt 11. Don't crowd your friends. Memories came crowding into her mind. crowd around the stove to keep warm be crowded/packed with visitors

TextRun.Text: 2. 理应做某事；应该做某事

RichText.Text: 1. 汽车数量的增加 2. 理应做某事；应该做某事 3. 支持、信任与坦诚皆是理所当然 4. 专心倾听朋友的诉说 5. 难以腾出空间容纳…… 6. 认可/同意他们的选择 7. 包容/原谅他人的缺点； 寻求原谅 8. 让一段关系趋于圆满； 熟能生巧； 使技艺完美；完善技艺 9. 设立个人边界/界限 10. 害怕受到伤害 11. 不要过度干涉/排挤朋友； 往事涌上她的心头； 围在炉火旁取暖； 挤满/充满游客
